creator: toby@mi6.gen.nz
text:
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> writes:

> Maintainer of textproc/p5-Text-Tabs+Wrap,
>
> Please note that PR ports/107506 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I approve the patch, FWIW.  I don't think there's any value in me
being the maintainer for this port any more as I don't currently run
FreeBSD.  Can the committer please also set the maintainer to
ports@freebsd.org?

Thanks,
Toby.
